description: Authored-PR snapshot from the my-prs-tracker orchestration. One entry per scheduler run summarising every active PR in the ZTS repository that I authored, bucketed into actionable states (failing-build, merge-conflict, needs-my-response, blocked-on-reviewers, ready-to-complete, draft-stale, healthy-in-progress). Pinned when any PR needs my attention. A companion daily summary is written to Zakira (my-prs-state:daily-summary) for the future daily-morning-digest composer.

contentTemplate.label: Hot list
contentTemplate.description: Use level 'warning' when there are PRs in any of: failing-build, merge-conflict, needs-my-response, blocked-on-reviewers. Omit otherwise. Body should bullet each hot PR with id, state, title, and one-line reason.

contentTemplate.label: My active PRs
contentTemplate.description: One row per active PR I authored. Expected columns: Id, Title, State (status pill), MergeStatus, Draft, Link.

contentTemplate.title: Needs my response
contentTemplate.description: PRs where a reviewer voted -5 (waiting for author). One nested keyValue per PR with the reason and was->now state transition.

contentTemplate.title: Blocked on reviewers
contentTemplate.description: PRs where required reviewers have not yet approved and the PR is past the staleness window.

contentTemplate.title: Failing build
contentTemplate.description: PRs with a reviewer rejection (vote = -10) or a failed required policy evaluation.

contentTemplate.title: Merge conflict
contentTemplate.description: PRs whose mergeStatus is conflicts / rejectedByPolicy / failure.

contentTemplate.title: Ready to complete
contentTemplate.description: PRs with all required approvals and a clean merge - safe to complete from the PR page.

contentTemplate.title: Draft (stale)
contentTemplate.description: Drafts older than the configured staleHoursDraft window with no recent activity.

contentTemplate.label: Run Notes
contentTemplate.description: Free-form footer line with the run id and the dryRun / forceSurface flags so the entry is self-describing.

expectedActions.label: Open ZTS PRs page
expectedActions.description: Opens the Azure DevOps PR list filtered to PRs I authored.

expectedActions.label: Dismiss
expectedActions.description: Archive this run summary without further action.
